goranime.config.title: GoranIME
goranime.config.option.prevent_fullwidth: On Windows, force IME to stay in halfwidth mode when typing Korean.
goranime.config.option.auto_korean_on_fo: Automatically enable Korean input when a text field gains focus.
goranime.config.option.remember_per_scre: Remember Korean/English state separately for each screen type.
goranime.config.option.show_indicator.to: Show KO/EN badge inside text fields when typing.
